transition.label: travel >= CROSSING_MIN
inside[id] = false, insideCount--, permission[id] = false, occ--, requested[id] = false

query.comment: Deadlock freedom for the whole AVIMS model.

query.formula: A[] forall (i : vid_t) forall (j : vid_t) (i != j && inside[i] && inside[j]) imply !conflictMoves(move_of[i], move_of[j])
query.comment: Safety: no two vehicles with conflicting movements are inside the intersection together.

query.formula: A[] forall (i : vid_t) inside[i] imply permission[i]
query.comment: No vehicle is inside without a granted permission (C-02).
The scheduling decision respects the 50 ms bound (NFR-01).

query.formula: A[] forall (i : vid_t) permission[i] imply serverSynced
query.comment: Backup is synchronized before any permission is active (FR-08, NFR-03).
Intersection occupancy never exceeds the number of service channels (M/M/CHANNELS).
Liveness/M/M2 witness: two compatible vehicles (NS, SS) can cross simultaneously when CHANNELS=2.
